seedanceSegments.title: Yolk break hook
seedanceSegments.description: Open on the final bibimbap texture: yolk break, radial bowl re-anchor, chili-sesame sauce gloss, then hard cut back to process.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead island view and terrazzo surface lock. Use @FinalBibimbapOverheadFrame only as the final bowl topology reference: 16-18 cm bowl, rice base, 5-6 distinct topping wedges, beef wedge, one normal fried egg centered. Use @FriedEggYolkFrame only as the intact-yolk and controlled-yolk-break reference. Use @Spoon only as the utensil shape. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible hands when the spoon enters. Kitchen continuity lock: same Licorn kitchen layout and materials, light terrazzo countertop, no wood countertop, no redesigned stovetop. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only spoon touch, soft yolk pop, sticky sauce pour, wet rice gloss. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s spoon tip breaks the intact yolk and yellow gloss begins to flow; 1.2-2.4s overhead re-anchor of finished radial bowl; 2.4-3.6s one tablespoon dark chili-sesame sauce lands beside yolk; 3.6-5.0s macro of yolk, sauce and rice touching before hard cut. Scale lock: bowl 16-18 cm, one normal egg, sauce one tablespoon, not oversized, not miniature, not flooded. Global negatives: no text, no captions, no music, no speech, no extra bowls, no full mixing yet, no broken yolk before first shot, no sauce flood.

seedanceSegments.title: Rice steam and beef marinade
seedanceSegments.description: Rice texture, steam reveal, thin beef strip scale, glossy soy-sesame marinade and coating.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as active overhead island view for prep shots. Use @InductionCloseup only for the saucepan steam shot and keep the induction as a flush black plate with no flame. Use @SaucepanLarge only as saucepan shape. Use @RiceSteamFrame only as rice-grain and steam texture reference. Use @Whisk only for mixing marinade. Use @BeefMarinatedStripsFrame only as the beef strip scale and marinade gloss reference: strips 0.5-1 cm wide, 4-6 cm long, not minced, not steak chunks. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands. Kitchen continuity: keep light terrazzo countertop and no wood countertop. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no soft transitions, no extra shots. ASMR food style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; water rinse, lid lift steam, knife taps, whisk swirl, wet beef toss only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s rinsed rice drains as separate grains; 0.9-2.0s saucepan opens and steam reveals moist separate rice; 2.0-3.0s beef is cut into thin strips on the island; 3.0-4.0s soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic and ginger whisk into a dark fluid marinade; 4.0-5.0s beef strips drop in and get glossy. Scale lock: beef strips 0.5-1 cm by 4-6 cm, rice grains visible, not porridge, not minced meat, not a whole steak. Global negatives: no text, no music, no speech, no open flame, no opaque marinade paste, no giant beef pieces, no wood countertop.
